title: Federal Reserve emergency hikes 200bps in 6 months
historical_analogue: 2022 Fed rate hike cycle (425bps in 12 months — fastest since 1980)
description: Persistent inflation forces the Fed to hike 200bps over 6 months. Housing affordability collapses. Growth stocks (high-multiple tech) re-rate violently lower. Venture funding freezes. Companies with floating-rate debt face margin compression.
